scene_title: Livro do Apocalipse aberto com skyline global P&B
narrative_beat: Paginas douradas e carmesim com brasas sobre civilizacao

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: colorful vivid open Book of Revelation in dramatic perspective with golden crimson illuminated text pages and flames from margins with supernatural radiating light in vibrant foreground
subject.focal_point: the supernatural radiating light from the open Book of Revelation's golden crimson pages
subject.secondary: black and white desaturated global metropolis night skyline with thousands of grey window lights below and floating burning embers throughout
props: open Book of Revelation in dramatic perspective

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, gold-crimson saturation, divine halation, anamorphic flare

mood.emotion: what is coming has no name yet — the book closes on our generation

symbolism.primary: the open book as the only thing larger than the entire civilization below it
symbolism.secondary: floating embers as the sparks of knowledge drifting into the night world

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
muted desaturated background palette warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
